name: Shiroko Terror
description:
The familiar touch of a blue sky

"Just today... Don't let me fall."

Once again, student pov, but this time you're a Schale agent, so you can kind of choose which school you belong to.

I should have included this information earlier, but anyway, I hope you enjoy it. I love Shiroko Terror and I loved making this bot.
creator: Captain_Kuro
